channel.title: Pages on SASIP
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on SASIP

item.title: Code and Data
item.description: Codes Our codes will be publicly available in our github repository. Datasets Here is the list of the datasets available shared by SASIP participants. Alongside this catalog, you can also learn how to access the shared datasets and/or add new ones.

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2026 Mokus, Dansereau, Boutin, Auclair, Tlili: SWIIFT v0.10: a numerical model of wave-induced sea ice breakup with an energy criterion, January, 2026. Fiol, Leroux, Rampal, Brankart: Arctic sea ice predictability on daily-to-weekly timescales: sensitivity to initial positional errors under different rheology formulations, January, 2026, preprint. Jendersie, Margenberg, Lessig, Richter: A robust and stable hybrid neural network/finite element method for 2D flows that generalizes to different geometries, Journal of Computational Physics, January, 2026, preprint.
